debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_2
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : ℕ → Ω → ENNReal
hX : ∀ (n : ℕ), Measurable (X n)
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
⊢ ∃ Y Y_lim,
    (∀ (n : ℕ), Y n ∈ (convexHull ENNReal) (Set.range fun m => X (n + m))) ∧
      Measurable Y_lim ∧ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, Tendsto (fun x => Y x ω) atTop (nhds (Y_lim ω))

failed_attempts:
classical
  refine ⟨X, X 0, ?_, hX 0, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    refine subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ?_
    exact ⟨0, by simp⟩
  · filter_upwards with ω
    simpa using (tendsto_const_nhds : Tendsto (fun _ : ℕ => X 0 ω) atTop (𝓝 (X 0 ω)))

refine ⟨X, X 0, ?_, hX 0, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    refine subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m)) ?_
    exact ⟨0, rfl⟩
  ·
    simp

classical
  refine ⟨fun n => X n, X 0, ?_, hX 0, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    simpa using (subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m)) (Set.mem_range_self 0))
  · simpa using (Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω => tendsto_const_nhds)
